description_long: This clock tower is a compact, freestanding structure crafted primarily from polished wood, featuring ornate carved columns and a decorative arched roof. The front face displays a single, round clock face with black Roman numerals, gold hands, and a white background, set within a rectangular frame with gold accents. Below the clock face, a glass-fronted compartment reveals a brass pendulum, adding to the traditional charm. The sides are solid wood with spiral columns, while the back is flat and unadorned, emphasizing the tower's verticality. The base is wide and sturdy, with a stepped design and a slightly arched front panel. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a miniature grandfather clock, blending Neoclassical and Victorian influences.
description: A polished wooden clock tower with ornate columns, an arched roof, and a single Roman numeral clock face above a visible brass pendulum. The design is traditional and richly detailed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the clock face with Roman numerals, gold hands, and a visible brass pendulum behind a glass panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structure, spiral columns, and the solid wooden panels without any clock face.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned wooden back with the arched roof and column details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 1 with spiral columns and solid wood panels.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is round with a white background, black Roman numerals, and gold hands. It is set within a rectangular frame with gold decorative accents. The design is traditional, with clear, bold markings and a classic pendulum visible below.
